action.command:
python -c '
import os, inspect
import json
from PIL import Image
import torch
import numpy as np
os.environ["HF_HUB_OFFLINE"] = "1"
print("=== Evaluator Inspection ===")
from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator
print("Init signature:", inspect.signature(Evaluator.__init__))
print("\nSource excerpt (init and evaluate methods):")
source = inspect.getsource(Evaluator)
print("\n".join([line for line in source.split("\n") if "def " in line or "self.tasks" in line or "self.episode_config" in line or "evaluate_single_episode" in line or "def __init__" in line][:30]))
print("\nPublic attrs:", [x for x in dir(Evaluator) if not x.startswith("_")])
print("\n=== Preprocess Batch Diagnostic ===")
from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy
from lerobot.policies.factory import make_pre_post_processors
policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained("lerobot/pi0_base")
policy = policy.to("cpu")
preprocess, postprocess = make_pre_post_processors(policy.config, "lerobot/pi0_base", preprocessor_overrides={"device_processor": {"device": "cpu"}})
print("Preprocess type:", type(preprocess))
images = {name: Image.new("RGB", (224, 224), color=(100,100,100)) for name in ["base_0_rgb", "left_wrist_0_rgb", "right_wrist_0_rgb"]}
state = torch.zeros((1, 32), dtype=torch.float32)
instruction = "put the white mug on the left plate"
batch_formats = [
    {"observation": {"images": images, "state": state}, "complementary_data": {"task": instruction}},
    {"observation": {"images": images, "state": state}, "task": instruction},
    {"observation": {"images": images, "state": state, "language": {"text": [instruction]}}},
    {"observation.images.base_0_rgb": images["base_0_rgb"], "observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb": images["left_wrist_0_rgb"], "observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb": images["right_wrist_0_rgb"], "observation.state": state, "task": instruction},
    {"observation": {"images": images, "state": state}, "complementary_data": {"task": [instruction]}},
]
for idx, b in enumerate(batch_formats):
    print(f"\nFormat {idx}: keys={list(b.keys())}")
    try:
        pbatch = preprocess(b)
        print("  -> SUCCESS!")
        if isinstance(pbatch, dict):
            print("  Processed top keys:", list(pbatch.keys()))
            if "observation" in pbatch:
                print("  obs subkeys:", list(pbatch["observation"].keys()))
        break
    except Exception as e:
        print("  -> ERROR:", type(e).__name__ + ":", str(e)[:150])
print("\nDiagnostic complete.
")'
